markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX.ai's business, product, and potential Series B financing with Meritech Capital Partners.](https://fathom.video/share/CZHoBepLn-eG9LrQxPVQGPsWsNUi7Ud3?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX.ai provides AI-powered content strategy and production services, achieving $11M run rate with 72% gross margins](https://fathom.video/share/CZHoBepLn-eG9LrQxPVQGPsWsNUi7Ud3?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
  - [The company uses a combination of human expertise and AI workflows to create high-quality, targeted content for clients](https://fathom.video/share/CZHoBepLn-eG9LrQxPVQGPsWsNUi7Ud3?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
  - [GrowthX.ai is considering raising a $40-60M Series B to accelerate growth and dominate the market](https://fathom.video/share/CZHoBepLn-eG9LrQxPVQGPsWsNUi7Ud3?tab=summary&timestamp=2688.0)
  - [The business model shows strong customer retention, upsells, and efficient growth metrics (high magic number, low burn multiple)](https://fathom.video/share/CZHoBepLn-eG9LrQxPVQGPsWsNUi7Ud3?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX.ai's Business Model and Value Proposition

  - [Offers a "one-stop shop" for content strategy and production, solving pain points for marketers](https://fathom.video/share/CZHoBepLn-eG9LrQxPVQGPsWsNUi7Ud3?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
  - [Combines human expertise with AI-powered workflows to create high-quality, targeted content](https://fathom.video/share/CZHoBepLn-eG9LrQxPVQGPsWsNUi7Ud3?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
  - [Focuses on comprehensive, fresh content at scale to win in AI-driven search and content discovery](https://fathom.video/share/CZHoBepLn-eG9LrQxPVQGPsWsNUi7Ud3?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [Addresses the changing landscape of how people research and discover information](https://fathom.video/share/CZHoBepLn-eG9LrQxPVQGPsWsNUi7Ud3?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)

### Product and Technology

  - [Uses a coding agent to create and manage workflows for content research, creation, and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/CZHoBepLn-eG9LrQxPVQGPsWsNUi7Ud3?tab=summary&timestamp=1973.0)
  - [Developed an internal platform for managing client context, research, and content production](https://fathom.video/share/CZHoBepLn-eG9LrQxPVQGPsWsNUi7Ud3?tab=summary&timestamp=1667.0)
  - [Planning to launch "checkdad.ai", a visibility tool to compete with existing market intelligence platforms](https://fathom.video/share/CZHoBepLn-eG9LrQxPVQGPsWsNUi7Ud3?tab=summary&timestamp=2526.0)
  - [Emphasizes the importance of expert-in-the-loop processes for maintaining quality](https://fathom.video/share/CZHoBepLn-eG9LrQxPVQGPsWsNUi7Ud3?tab=summary&timestamp=1941.0)

### Business Performance and Metrics

  - [Achieved $11M run rate, burning only $3M to date](https://fathom.video/share/CZHoBepLn-eG9LrQxPVQGPsWsNUi7Ud3?tab=summary&timestamp=2361.0)
  - [Last month: burned $237K, added almost $2M in new business](https://fathom.video/share/CZHoBepLn-eG9LrQxPVQGPsWsNUi7Ud3?tab=summary&timestamp=2374.0)
  - [Q3 projected to end with 72% gross margins](https://fathom.video/share/CZHoBepLn-eG9LrQxPVQGPsWsNUi7Ud3?tab=summary&timestamp=2424.0)
  - [High magic number and low burn multiple indicate efficient growth](https://fathom.video/share/CZHoBepLn-eG9LrQxPVQGPsWsNUi7Ud3?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)
  - [100% conversion rate from strategy sprints in the last three months](https://fathom.video/share/CZHoBepLn-eG9LrQxPVQGPsWsNUi7Ud3?tab=summary&timestamp=2383.0)

### Customer Traction and Expansion

  - [Notable logos include Augment Code, Surge, Airbyte, and others](https://fathom.video/share/CZHoBepLn-eG9LrQxPVQGPsWsNUi7Ud3?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
  - [Significant upsells: Surge ($60K to $230K/month), Augment ($15K to $50K/month), Airbyte ($12K to $30K/month)](https://fathom.video/share/CZHoBepLn-eG9LrQxPVQGPsWsNUi7Ud3?tab=summary&timestamp=1401.0)
  - [Customers proactively requesting expanded services](https://fathom.video/share/CZHoBepLn-eG9LrQxPVQGPsWsNUi7Ud3?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)

### Growth Strategy and Future Plans

  - [Aiming to reach $47M ARR next year (from $15M projected end-of-year)](https://fathom.video/share/CZHoBepLn-eG9LrQxPVQGPsWsNUi7Ud3?tab=summary&timestamp=2625.0)
  - [Planning to increase from 2 to 4 customer kickoffs per week](https://fathom.video/share/CZHoBepLn-eG9LrQxPVQGPsWsNUi7Ud3?tab=summary&timestamp=2632.0)
  - [Launching an expert marketplace to augment forward-deployed experts](https://fathom.video/share/CZHoBepLn-eG9LrQxPVQGPsWsNUi7Ud3?tab=summary&timestamp=2480.0)
  - [Developing visibility tools to compete with and "obliterate" competitors like Profound and Sprunch](https://fathom.video/share/CZHoBepLn-eG9LrQxPVQGPsWsNUi7Ud3?tab=summary&timestamp=2581.0)

### Financing Plans

  - [Considering raising $40-60M Series B](https://fathom.video/share/CZHoBepLn-eG9LrQxPVQGPsWsNUi7Ud3?tab=summary&timestamp=2688.0)
  - [Not artificially accelerating the process, focused on finding the right partner](https://fathom.video/share/CZHoBepLn-eG9LrQxPVQGPsWsNUi7Ud3?tab=summary&timestamp=2707.0)
  - [Alternative scenario: forgo raising and reach profitability in two months](https://fathom.video/share/CZHoBepLn-eG9LrQxPVQGPsWsNUi7Ud3?tab=summary&timestamp=2737.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send data room access to Meritech Capital Partners](https://fathom.video/share/CZHoBepLn-eG9LrQxPVQGPsWsNUi7Ud3?tab=summary&timestamp=2761.0)
  - [Meritech to review materials and follow up shortly](https://fathom.video/share/CZHoBepLn-eG9LrQxPVQGPsWsNUi7Ud3?tab=summary&timestamp=2796.0)
  - [Potential deeper dive into specific aspects of the business in future conversations](https://fathom.video/share/CZHoBepLn-eG9LrQxPVQGPsWsNUi7Ud3?tab=summary&timestamp=2747.0)
  - [Marcel open to spending more time with Meritech team to answer additional questions](https://fathom.video/share/CZHoBepLn-eG9LrQxPVQGPsWsNUi7Ud3?tab=summary&timestamp=2771.0)
